title: About AccessPath Guide
description: AccessPath Guide is an independent editorial resource that explains Lifeline without acting as an agency, provider, or application processor.
headings: How this policy works in practice

title: Contact AccessPath Guide
description: Contact the editorial team about corrections, accessibility, source updates, or general website feedback.

title: Editorial Policy
description: Our editorial process prioritizes official sources, qualified language, clear distinctions, and useful consumer context.
headings: How this policy works in practice

title: Fact-Checking Policy
description: Time-sensitive Lifeline facts are checked against primary sources and assigned a scheduled review date.
headings: How this policy works in practice

title: Corrections Policy
description: Material errors are corrected transparently, dated, and reviewed across every page that relies on the affected claim.
headings: How this policy works in practice

title: Privacy Policy
description: This static website does not collect benefit documents or run analytics by default; local tools remain in the visitor browser.
headings: Information this build does not collect
How this policy works in practice

title: Independent Information Disclaimer
description: This website is not affiliated with the FCC, USAC, Medicaid, SNAP, any state agency, or any Lifeline provider.
headings: No eligibility, device, price, or delivery guarantee
How this policy works in practice

title: Terms and Conditions
description: These terms govern use of AccessPath Guide as an informational publication, not an application or provider service.
headings: How this policy works in practice

title: Accessibility Statement
description: AccessPath Guide is designed toward WCAG 2.2 AA with keyboard access, clear structure, contrast, responsive layouts, and reduced motion.
